scenarios.name: usePermissions definition (sample alignment)
scenarios.indexedSql: SELECT file_path, kind FROM symbols WHERE name = 'usePermissions'

scenarios.name: Top 10 dependency fan-out (same as --recipe fan-out)
scenarios.indexedSql: SELECT from_path, COUNT(*) AS deps FROM dependencies GROUP BY from_path ORDER BY deps DESC, from_path ASC LIMIT 10
